field.name: result_package_id
field.domain: [('package_type_id', '=?', package_type_id), '|', '|', ('location_id', '=', location_dest_id), ('id', 'in', origin_package_ids), '&', ('location_id', '=', False), '|', ('move_line_ids', '=', False), ('move_line_ids.location_dest_id', '=', location_dest_id)]
